systemDetail: Mews Distributor — React SPA booking engine. The whole flow is a same-origin iframe at https://app.mews.com/distributor/{uuid}; URL never changes between steps.
deepLinkNote: NO date-prefilled deep link exists. Tested all common param formats against a live load + body-text check — NONE prefill the calendar: ?start=, ?startDate=, ?arrival=, ?from=, ?checkin=, ?cin= (plus matching end/to/checkout/cout/endDate/departure). The calendar MUST be driven manually.

iframe.note: Same-origin (app.mews.com -> app.mews.com). Reach elements via Playwright frameLocator('iframe[name^="mews-distributor"]') or page.frames().find(f => f.name().startsWith('mews-distributor')). The cookie banner is the only thing that lives in the TOP page, not the iframe. There are additional NESTED iframes on the payment page for card fields (see paymentIndicator).

cookieDismiss.frame: top page (NOT inside the distributor iframe)

steps.desc: Navigate to https://app.mews.com/distributor/{uuid} with waitUntil=domcontentloaded (NOT networkidle — Mews keeps a websocket open and networkidle never resolves). Then wait for iframe[name^="mews-distributor"] and a visible button inside it.
Dismiss the 'We use cookies / Accept all' banner. Lives in the top page, not the iframe.
Open the date picker. Equivalent frameLocator: fl().locator('button').filter({ hasText: 'Select dates' }).first().

Calendar opens showing current + next month side-by-side. For T+45 dates you must advance. DETECT month visibility by sampling day-button aria-labels (NOT h2/h3 — those pick up the stepper text 'Dates/Categories'). Click the 'Next month' button until the target month appears in the first/last day-button aria-label. Up to ~10 clicks.

Pick check-in day. Day cells are <button aria-label="16 August 2026, Sunday">16</button>. Use PREFIX match on aria-label (startsWith '{day} {month} {year}'). Skip cells where aria-disabled="true" OR data-test-date starts with 'disabled-'. After selection the label gains ', SelectedAsStartDate'.
Pick check-out day (T+2 after the actual selected start). May need another navigateMonth if start/end differ. After selection the label gains ', SelectedAsEndDate'.

Set adults = 2. The adults counter is the FIRST Increment/Decrement pair on the dates page. Read the current count from the 'Adults' label's row (regex /Adults?\D+(\d+)/ after climbing up to 5 parent levels), then Increment if <2 or Decrement if >2. The default is sometimes 1, sometimes 2 depending on property.

steps.selector: iframe >> button[data-test-id="dates-next-button"]  (or button[aria-label="Next"])  — click via element.click() in frame.evaluate, NOT Playwright click
steps.desc: Advance Dates -> Categories. The calendar portal overlay (div[data-mds-element] MonthElement inside #portal-container) intercepts Playwright pointer clicks; press Escape first OR use frame.evaluate(() => button.click()) to bypass. Has data-test-id="dates-next-button".
Categories page: each room card has a 'Show rates' button. Click the first one to expand available rate plans for that room.

steps.selector: iframe >> button:has-text('Book now')  (first match, EXACT text /^Book now$/i)
steps.desc: Rates expand inline. Each rate plan has a 'Book now' button. Click the first enabled one. Adds the room to cart and lands on the Summary step.
Summary step -> Continue. Lands on the 'Details' step (the PAYMENT page — see paymentIndicator).
STOP here. The Details step is the payment page. Do NOT click 'Confirm' — that attempts the charge.

paymentIndicator.primary: Datatrans Secure-Fields nested iframes inside the distributor iframe: iframe[name^="securefields-"][name$="--cardNumber"] (card number) and iframe[name^="securefields-"][name$="--cvv"] (CVV). These only render on the Details/payment page.
paymentIndicator.secondary: input#expiration (autocomplete=cc-exp) and input#holderName (cardholder name) — NOT inside an iframe, directly in the distributor iframe document.
paymentIndicator.heading: An <h2/h3/h4> containing 'Payment' (e.g. 'Contact & payment details', 'Payment').
paymentIndicator.ctaButton: button with EXACT text 'Confirm' — this is the CHARGE button; on some properties it is disabled until required contact fields are filled. Never click in a friction test.
paymentIndicator.urlChange: NONE — the URL stays https://app.mews.com/distributor/{uuid} for every step (SPA). URL cannot be used as a payment indicator.
paymentIndicator.stepper: The step indicator at the top shows '5 Details' as the active/highlighted step on the payment page (steps: 1 Dates, 2 Categories, 3 Rates, 4 Summary, 5 Details).

paymentProvider: Datatrans (Swiss acquirer) Secure Fields — branded to the user as 'Secured with Mews Payments'. reCAPTCHA Enterprise (invisible) loads on the Details page and would fire on Confirm.
gotchas: waitUntil=networkidle NEVER resolves (Mews holds a websocket open). Use domcontentloaded + explicit waits.
The cookie banner is in the TOP page; the booking flow is in the iframe. Two different frames for two different tasks.
NO deep link. Six common param-format families were tested; none prefill dates. Calendar must be driven.
Month detection: do NOT use h2/h3 innerText — the stepper headings ('Dates','Categories',...) live in h2/h3 and give false matches. Sample day-button aria-labels instead.

Playwright's CSS selector engine did not reliably match [aria-label^="16 August 2026"] on the day cells (returned count 0 even when frame.evaluate found the node). Use frame.evaluate(() => querySelectorAll + click) to pick days.
Calendar portal overlay (MonthElement in #portal-container) intercepts Playwright pointer-clicks on the dates 'Next' button. Press Escape first, or use frame.evaluate(() => btn.click()) to bypass.

Disabled/booked days carry BOTH aria-disabled="true" AND data-test-date="disabled-M/D/YYYY" — check both before clicking. Availability differs per property and per date (e.g. Elmhirst's had Aug 16 disabled).
The adults default varies by property (1 or 2). Always read the current count and adjust rather than blindly clicking Increment.
After picking the start date the calendar sometimes jumps to a different month view — re-run navigateMonth before picking the end date.

Use EXACT-text match for the forward CTAs. 'Next' substring-matches the carousel 'Next image' buttons (room photo carousel) and misfires. Use innerText.trim().toLowerCase() === 'continue' / 'book now' / 'show rates'.
The 'Details' step is the PAYMENT page — it combines the guest form AND payment fields on one page. There is no separate '/pay' or '/checkout' URL step.
Confirm (the charge button) may be disabled until required contact fields are filled — its presence (even disabled) plus the cardNumber securefield iframe is the reliable payment-page signal.

Card number + CVV inputs are inside NESTED iframes (Datatrans Secure Fields) — to actually type a card number you'd need page.frameLocator('iframe[name^="mews-distributor"]').frameLocator('iframe[name^="securefields-"][name$="--cardNumber"]').locator('input'). For a friction test, STOP before this.
Stealth plugin (puppeteer-extra-plugin-stealth via playwright-extra) was used; without it Mews/Datatrans may flag the session. reCAPTCHA Enterprise is invisible and only executes on Confirm.
